title: WorkshopSF | DIY Art & Craft Classes for Adults in San Francisco
content: WorkshopSF is a DIY school for adults, offering affordable Classes on crafting, painting, leather working, urban gardening, sewing & more.

title: Exploratorium: After Dark Thursdays · Reviews
content: All Experiences in San Francisco. # Exploratorium: After Dark Thursdays · Reviews. Tons of things to do. I felt like a kid again :). 4 hours is barely enough to explore the whole exhibit. Will have to come back. I bought the tickets for my daughters. They had a nice time. Top night, a pleasant surprise as had no idea what to expect. We booked it as an idea of what to do for a night when we were in town. If you do something once, the evening flew by and was fun as well as interesting. Don't miss this experience!
